name: Hiyori Minagi
description: **Height:** 154 cm She learned fly-fishing from [her father](https://anilist.co/character/261543) and now she enjoys fishing in the nearby ocean. She was extremely shy as a child and spent most of her time hiding behind [Koi](https://anilist.co/character/202956).

name: Ikuto Sarashina
description: __Height:__ 178 cm The second of the "idiot trio", which includes [Shirakawa Naoya](https://anilist.co/character/28197/Naoya-Shirakawa) and [Ryuunosuke Kurosaki](https://anilist.co/character/29387/Ryuunosuke-Kurosaki). A closet otaku, he is actually good at drawing manga illustrations, enjoys writing, and wants to be a mangaka. His friends call him "Ikkun".

name: Jun Suzuki
description: **Role:** Bassist **Instrument:** Bass Guitar Jun is [Azusa](https://anilist.co/character/21173/Azusa-Nakano)'s and [Ui](https://anilist.co/character/19571/Ui-Hirasawa)'s classmate who often hangs out with the latter. Jun is generally a playful and easygoing girl, but she is sometimes rude without realizing it, compelling [Azusa](https://anilist.co/character/21173/Azusa-Nakano) to reprimand her. [Ui](https://anilist.co/character/19571/Ui-Hirasawa) tries to get her to join the light music club bu

name: Kimichika Haijima
description: A first-year student at Seiin High School. He serves as a setter for the boys' volleyball club, and is referred to as the "Genius Setter" due to his remarkable skills. Kimichika often comes off as cold and emotionally distant, but has shown a softer side around people he cares about, such as Yuni Kuroba. He shows a great love for volleyball, and is incredibly driven, focused and determined to bring any team he plays on to victory. However, the brutal honesty he uses when critiquing his teammates
mediaTitles: 2.43: Seiin High School Boys Volleyball Team
searchTerms: 2.43: Seiin High School Boys Volleyball Team

name: Kohaku  Oukawa
description: __Unit:__ Crazy:B __Circles:__ Kaori, Sweets Fan Club Because his only knowledge of the world comes from what he's learned from the internet and TV, his understanding of things is a little off. He was born into the Suou branch family. He's a persevering, hard worker, but he has an especially sharp tongue toward those close to him. He speaks in the Kyoto dialect, and he behaves as if he's more mature than he actually is. He has a sharp, clear voice, and his performances are delicate and beautiful

name: Koujirou Sasahara
description: A rich flamboyant high school boy who likes to think he is an aristocrat when in reality his family are just farmers. He likes to ride his goat to school and is often seen with his butler.

name: Masane Amaha
description: Masane is the latest in a long line of female bearers of the Witchblade, an arcane and ancient weapon of unthinkable power. Conscripted into the service of the Doji Group, she is charged with destroying X-Cons, a murderous scourge of mysterious origin stalking the streets of Tokyo. The doting mother of Rihoko, and more than a little flighty, Masane is willing to make any sacrifice to provide for the young girl that provides her only peace. (Source: Funimation)

name: Miria Akagi
description: **Height:** 140 cm **Hometown:** Tokyo, Japan Miria is a young girl who really loves to talk. Possessing boundless energy, a sunny and positive outlook, and enthusiasm for everything she does, Miria became an idol because doing all the cute things seemed fun.

name: Nanao Nakajima
description: ~!Can neutralize other people’s powers.!~ ~!After his ability mutates, he is able to neutralize the human body functions too. This can mean neutralizing their bodily functions (breathing, heartbeat, etc.). In addition, the extent of neutralizing human body functions allows him to neutralize people's moral capacity, turning them into temporary killing machines. He is essentially able to mind-control them into the killing.!~

name: Natural Killer Saibou
nativeName: ナチュラルキラー細胞
description: She is a white blood cell, specifically a Lymphocyte (Natural Killer Cell). She is tasked to identify, track, and kill viruses and infected cells by moving freely from tissue to tissue. (Source: Cells at Work Wiki)
searchTerms: ナチュラルキラー細胞

description: Pocchama is the first Pokemon [Hikari](https://anilist.co/character/3966) received at the beginning of her journey.

name: Rima Mashiro
description: The girl serving as the new Q-Chair. She is a transfer student and the same age as Amu. Rima is a short, cute and beautiful girl with a selfish personality. She is well-liked among male students and disliked by female students, such as Amu. She feigns crying to deceive people. At one point of the manga, while looking for X Eggs with Amu, she Character transforms and destroys one unnecessarily. She is bad at sports. Her Character Transformation with Kusu Kusu is called "Clown Drop." When she does

name: Roko Sekino
description: __Height:__ 140 cm Roko is a second-year high school student and a former child actor who struggles to find work. She was once loved by many for her role in a popular series of broccoli commercials. Despite being a sixteen-year-old high school student, Roko stands at only 140 centimeters (4-foot 7-inches) tall, a somewhat humble reminder of her ten years working as a child actor. name: Shizuku
description: The priestess of Suwa Shrine under the orders of Yorishige. She's a member of Elusive Warriors.

name: Suzuka Nagami
description: Being seemingly perfect in everything she does while she is the student council president makes her very popular. She is trying her best to help everyone out that is in need but she has a big secret, she loves her brother to the point her fantasies can get intense enough so she actually loses her sense of reason for a certain time. name: Toubaru-sensei
description: A teacher of literature at the school [Reina](https://anilist.co/character/121703) and her friends attend. She has a unique way of describing things. (Source: Official Site, translated, edited)
